title: sida micropetala
intro: Sida micropetala is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the small-flowered sida. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Sida micropetala has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and acting as a diuretic. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being made into capsules or used in topical applications.
